full_text:
Yang Yan (Qiongzhi)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Yan, styledQiongzhi, was born in Huayin in Hongnong. Beautiful, intelligent and skilled in the feminine arts, became Sima Yan’s empress. Yang Yan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Yang Yan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
